description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master or experimental branches, and pull requests to those branches. The workflow should have a BUILD_TYPE environment variable set to Release and perform GCC, Clang, and Intel oneAPI builds on ubuntu-latest and ubuntu-24.04-arm runners. For each build, check out the code, install required compilers and tools, create a build environment, configure the build with specific compiler flags, and perform a parallel build.
